text: In those days John the Baptist came preaching in the wilderness of Judea
and saying repent for the kingdom of heaven has come near
This is he who was spoken of through the prophet Isaiah a voice of one calling in the wilderness
From that time on Jesus began to preach repent for the kingdom of heaven has come near
Jesus went throughout Galilee teaching in their synagogues proclaiming the good news of the kingdom
Jesus stepped into a boat crossed over and came to his own town
Some men brought to him a paralyzed man lying on a mat when Jesus saw their faith he said to the man take heart son your sins are forgiven
That same day Jesus went out of the house and sat by the lake
Such large crowds gathered around him that he got into a boat and sat in it while all the people stood on the shore
Then he told them many things in parables saying a farmer went out to sow his seed
